cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/uniqkit/__init__.py b/uniqkit/__init__.py
index 1a7e389..b82be87 100644
--- a/uniqkit/__init__.py
+++ b/uniqkit/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,13 @@
 
 def compact(items):
     return [x for x in items if x]
+
+def unique_by(items, key):
+    seen = set()
+    out = []
+    for item in items:
+        k = key(item)
+        if k not in seen:
+            seen.add(k)
+            out.append(item)
+    return out

cases.name: dict_keeps_last
cases.diff:
diff --git a/uniqkit/__init__.py b/uniqkit/__init__.py
index 1a7e389..50e6b7e 100644
--- a/uniqkit/__init__.py
+++ b/uniqkit/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,6 @@
 
 def compact(items):
     return [x for x in items if x]
+
+def unique_by(items, key):
+    return list({key(item): item for item in items}.values())

cases.name: sorted_by_key
cases.diff:
diff --git a/uniqkit/__init__.py b/uniqkit/__init__.py
index 1a7e389..2f852c1 100644
--- a/uniqkit/__init__.py
+++ b/uniqkit/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,6 @@
 
 def compact(items):
     return [x for x in items if x]
+
+def unique_by(items, key):
+    return list({key(item): item for item in sorted(items, key=key)}.values())
